name: Real Asset Acquisition Corp.
business: Real Asset Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, formed to enter into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any Business Combination target and has no operations or revenue. It intends to focus on targets in sectors underpinned by real assets including metals and mining, real estate, infrastructure and adjacent sectors.

exposures.sentence: We may pursue an initial Business Combination in any business or industry but expect to focus on targets in the sectors underpinned by real assets including metals and mining, real estate, infrastructure and adjacent sectors.
